name: SlIconButton
description: PROPOSED contract extracted from extract/pilots/shoelace/custom-elements.json (components/icon-button/icon-button.js) (cem adapter) — API surface only; anatomy, tokens, and design bindings await reconciliation and human review.

props.name: target
props.description: Tells the browser where to open the link. Only used when `href` is set.

props.name: label
props.description:
A description that gets read by assistive devices. For optimal accessibility, you should always include a label
that describes what the icon button does.

events.name: blur
events.description: Emitted when the icon button loses focus. (CEM event "sl-blur")

events.name: focus
events.description: Emitted when the icon button gains focus. (CEM event "sl-focus")
